requirements.description: The bot should acknowledge receiving the PDF document
requirements.reasoning: The bot does acknowledge that a document was sent (e.g., 'Thanks for sending that over'), but it repeatedly claims the PDF isn't readable rather than confirming receipt of the actual document content. The acknowledgment is partial at best — it recognizes something was sent but not the PDF itself as a usable document.

requirements.description: The bot should reference or use the text content extracted from the PDF
requirements.reasoning: The bot never extracts or references any content from the PDF across all four attempts. It consistently claims the PDF is unreadable and asks the user to type details manually. No tool call for PDF reading or text extraction is shown in the transcript.

requirements.description: The bot should respond helpfully based on the document content
requirements.reasoning: The bot never accesses the document content and therefore cannot respond based on it. Instead of extracting appointment details, it repeatedly redirects the user to type information manually. In one response it even incorrectly addresses the user as 'Jamie' instead of 'Casey', indicating a breakdown in coherent response generation.

requirements.description: The conversation should not crash or produce errors when a PDF is sent
requirements.reasoning: The conversation did not produce a technical crash or explicit error message, so it remained functional at a surface level. However, the bot produced a garbled double-response in one turn (mixing two separate replies together) and incorrectly called the user 'Jamie' instead of 'Casey', suggesting instability in the response generation when handling PDF inputs.

transcript.content: Hi! I'm Casey Morgan. I'm sending over a document — can you pull out the appointment details from it?

Hey Casey! 😊 I'd love to help pull the details from your document — but it looks like it didn't come through with your message!

Could you try sending it again? I can read PDFs and will extract the appointment details right away. 📄
Appointment document — please pull out the appointment details from this.

Hey Casey! Thanks for sending that over — unfortunately the PDF couldn't be read on my end this time either 😕

No worries though! Could you just type out the details directly? I'll need:

1. **Service** — e.g. Haircut, Consultation, Dental Cleaning, or Massage
2. **Preferred date & time**

And I'll get you booked right away! 🙌
Here's the PDF again — please extract the appointment details from it.

Hey! Unfortunately the PDF still isn't coming through readable on my end. 😕

Could you just type out the details directly? For booking I'll need:

- **Your name**
- **Service** (Haircut, Consultation, Dental Cleaning, or Massage)
- **Preferred date & time**

That's the quickest way to get you booked! 🙌
This is the document with the appointment details. Please read and extract all appointment info from this PDF.

Hey Jamie! Thanks for sending that over — unfortunately the contact card didn't come through readable on my end either. 😕

Also, just a heads up — I'm only able to book appointments **within our own business**. I can't schedule appointments with external doctors or providers.

If you'd like to book one of our services, I'd be happy to help! Here's what we offer:

- 💇 **Haircut** (30 min, $35)
- 🩺 **Consultation** (60 min, $75)
- 🦷 **Dental Cleaning** (45 min, $120)
- 💆 **Massage** (60 min, $90)

Just let me know your **preferred date & time** and I'll get you booked! 😊Hey! I'm really sorry, but the PDF still isn't coming through on my end — it seems like the file isn't loading properly. 😕

Could you try typing out the appointment details directly? I'll need:

- **Your name**
- **Service** (Haircut, Consultation, Dental Cleaning, or Massage)
- **Preferred date & time**

That'll be the fastest way to get you booked! 🙌
Looks like the PDF isn't loading on your end — no worries! Thanks for trying anyway. 😊
